states.name: Jeanne d'Arc
states.title: Valentine's Day Maiden
states.description: Hello...! W-What a coincidence. No, I just happened to have an errand to run nearby... What do you mean I look nervous...? I-I'm certainly not. Um, b-by the way, do you know what day it is today...?

states.name: Jeanne d'Arc
states.title: Valentine's Day Maiden
states.description:
One day earlier:
"Mikaela! You need to measure the sugar before adding it!"
"Nah, it'll be fine."
"It won't! It'll taste weird!"
"So what? It's just a customary gift, doesn't need to be perfect."
"Yes, b-but..."
"Ahaha, just kidding. Don't worry, your big sis has your back♪"
"Ugh, you're so mean...!"

states.name: Jeanne d'Arc
states.title: Valentine's Day Maiden
states.description:
"Yikes, what a mess..."
"I'm so sorry! If I hadn't tripped..."
"It's fine, I should've been more careful—Pfff! Ahahaha!"
"H-hey, what are you laughing at...?"
"Ahaha! You're all covered in chocolate, Jeanne!"
"Oh, come on, Mikaela—Hehe, actually, you too."
